s: A beautiful, minimal daily Thirukkural flashcard widget.
d: A cross-platform daily Thirukkural flashcard widget. Cycles through all 1330 Kurals, showing one perfectly-formatted Kural each day with native Tamil typography and expert explanations. Features: • Fully offline functionality: No internet connection required. • Open Source: 100% free and open-source software with no trackers or ads. • Widget Customization: Extensive customization options including beautiful monochromatic themes, typography scaling, and multiple expert commentaries. • Multiple Sizes: Fully resizable widgets that gracefully adapt to different home screen layouts. • Battery-friendly: Native zero-battery epoch cycle math with a completely invisible background-only footprint. Note: The content of this app (Kurals and explanations) is available in Tamil and English.
